mapper.select: SELECT * /* @SQLID=SUB0504_04-01#Sql001 */ FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTAL_COUNT ,TBFSP.IFA_ACCOUNT_SEQ_NO ,TBFSP.BUTEN_CODE ,TBFSP.ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,TBFSP.AMOUNT ,TBFSP.BASE_DATE ,TO_CHAR(TBFSP.ORDER_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ORDER_TIME ,TBFSP.UPDATE_TIME ,TBFSP.CREATE_TIME ,MUAI.NAME_KANJI FROM T_BOND_F_SALES_PRICE TBFSP LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI ON TBFSP.BUTEN_CODE = MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AND TBFSP.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE TBFSP.BASE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY TBFSP.IFA_ACCOUNT_SEQ_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{maxRowNum}
